mnemonics: VOWELS for Android UI: View, OnDraw(), Widget, Event, Layout, Style/Theme
keyPoints: The View class is the fundamental building block for all UI components.
Layouts (ViewGroups) define the visual structure and hierarchy of a UI.
Using ConstraintLayout is recommended for creating complex, responsive, and flat view hierarchies.
commonMistakes: Defining layout dimensions in pixels (px) instead of density-independent pixels (dp), leading to improper scaling on different screen sizes.
Performing long-running operations on the main UI thread, which causes the application to become unresponsive (Application Not Responding errors).
Not providing alternative resources for different screen densities, orientations, and sizes, resulting in a poor user experience on some devices.
